description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Dial style: White dial with white and golden hands Strap style: White genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: 3-faced multifunction display, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant Size Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
